heading: ***HEAT ADVISORIES THROUGH THIS EVENING, AND EXTREME HEAT WARNINGS THROUGH THE CHAMPLAIN AND SOUTHERN VALLEYS, AND IN NH, SOUTH OF THE WHITE MOUNTAINS***Today
text: Mostly sunny, hot, and humid. Isolated, strong late-day showers or thunderstorms. Highs from the mid 80s to mid 90s north to south. Light winds becoming west to northwest 10 to 15 mph, a few gusts to 25 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Periods of clouds, with scattered, hit-or-miss showers and thunderstorms. Still rather warm and muggy. Lows in the 60s to near 70. Winds west to northwest near 10 mph, diminishing to light and variable.

heading: Saturday
text: Periods of clouds, with a few localized morning showers. Increasing afternoon sun, with a local shower or thunderstorm, mainly south of the Adirondacks and Rt. 4. Highs in the 80s, near 80 far north. Winds light, becoming west to northwest near 10 mph.

heading: Independence Day
text: Periods of clouds, with a few localized morning showers. Increasing afternoon sun, with a local shower or thunderstorm, mainly south of the Adirondacks and Rt. 4. Highs in the 80s, near 80 far north. Winds light, becoming west to northwest near 10 mph.
